title: La Kaffa International
description: lakaffagroup.com zoominfo.com/c/la-kaffa-international-co-ltd/426003975 La Kaffa International is a publicly listed Taiwanese multinational food and beverage group (Taiwan Stock Exchange, code: 2732), founded in 2004 and headquartered in Zhubei City, Hsinchu County, Taiwan, with over 663 employees and annual revenues around $46 million. The company is best known as the parent brand of Chatime — the world-famous bubble tea chain expanded to 50+ countries across 6 continents, making it the top takeout tea brand in Australia, Southeast Asia, and beyond. Beyond Chatime, La Kaffa manages a multi-brand portfolio of 9+ F&B concepts including ZenQ Dessert, Bake Code Bakery, ChunSun Cake, La Kaffa Cafe, Wagokoro Tonkatsu, and Osaka Ohsho Taiwan, with over 1,100 outlets in China alone
